name: Enrapturing Trance
descs:
Turn Start: This Gift activates for the whole Encounter when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply [Burst] Potency or Count. (except E.G.O Skills; except Backup Units)

When hitting an enemy with a Skill, inflict 5 [Burst] Potency.

When [Burst] Count on an enemy drops below 1, consume 10 [Burst] Potency instead of [Burst] Count. (This effect ends when [Burst] Potency drops below 10)

If the target has less than 3 [Burst] Count, inflict +1 more Count when inflicting [Burst] Count. (3 times per Encounter)
